# Install `notion-sidebar` — Notion Sidebar — tree nav + page CRUD (rename · drag · icon picker)

> Standalone Notion-style tree-nav sidebar with full page CRUD, lifted out of notion-shell so it is reusable on its own.

📚 Knowledge base : https://resource.rahmanef.com/llms.txt
📦 Slice detail   : https://resource.rahmanef.com/slices/notion-sidebar
🧠 JSON catalog   : https://resource.rahmanef.com/api/knowledge?slice=notion-sidebar
🤖 Prompt page    : https://resource.rahmanef.com/agents/notion-sidebar

## 1. Install

```bash
npx rahman-resources add notion-sidebar
# alias: npx rr add notion-sidebar
```

## 2. What it ships

- tags: `ui`, `notion`, `sidebar`, `tree`, `nav`, `page`, `crud`, `rename`, `drag`, `dnd`, `reorder`, `reparent`, `icon-picker`, `primitive`, `portable`, `notion-like`

## 3. Wire it up

Run `npx rr add notion-sidebar`. Import `import { NotionSidebar, type NotionSidebarPage } from "@/features/notion-sidebar"`. Feed it a flat `pages: NotionSidebarPage[]` ({ id, title, icon, parentId }) — the sidebar builds the tree. Wire callbacks: onSelect(id), onCreate(parentId|null), onRename(id, title) [double-click a title to trigger], onDelete(id), onMove(id, parentId, beforeId) [drag the grip — reorders + reparents], onIconChange(id, icon). For rich icons pass `renderIcon` (display) + `renderIconPicker` (click-to-pick) wired to `@/features/icon-picker` (DynamicIcon + IconPickerPopover). npm: @dnd-kit/core + sortable + utilities. Pair with notion-shell (page editor) + notion-database (embedded DBs) — the notion-page-clone-os template shows the full reducer wiring.

## Rules of engagement

- shadcn-only UI primitives. No raw `<button>` / `<dialog>` / native date or file inputs.
- 200-line hard cap per source file (extract neighbours when over).
- All Convex queries hit an index (`.withIndex(...)`); never bare `.collect()`.
- Public mutations/queries declare `args:` validators + authz.
- Full ruleset: https://resource.rahmanef.com/best-practice
